document.name: Brooklyn Public Library — Bay Ridge Storytime & Afterschool Playtime
document.address: 7223 Ridge Boulevard at 73rd Street, Brooklyn, NY 11209
document.shortDescription: Busy Bay Ridge BPL branch: morning Storytime in the Children's Program Room plus weekday Afterschool Playtime (see discover.bklynlibrary.org for dates).
document.longDescription:
Bay Ridge Library is one of Brooklyn Public Library's highest-traffic branches. Its official location page lists children's programs including Storytime on Wednesday mornings around 11:00 a.m. in the Children's Program Room, and Afterschool Playtime on weekday afternoons around 3:00 p.m. in the same room. The branch also hosts Chess for Kids and other family programs on its events calendar.

The library is fully accessible at 7223 Ridge Boulevard at 73rd Street, Brooklyn, NY 11209. Managing librarian Rita Meade; branch phone 718-748-5709. Hours vary by day (see the branch page for current open times).

Sources: https://www.bklynlibrary.org/locations/bay-ridge https://discover.bklynlibrary.org/?event=true&eventlocation=Bay+Ridge+Library
document.announcementDescription: Storytime and Afterschool Playtime meet in the Children's Program Room—confirm dates on BPL Discover.
